getCurrentThread.description: Returns the thread ID of the thread that is calling this method.

getCurrentThreadName.description: Returns the name of the current thread (for debugging purposes only!).

getLockerThread.description: Returns the thread ID of the thread the locks the given thread ID.

isAudioRunning.description: Returns true if the audio callback is running or false if it's suspended during a load operation.

isCurrentlyExporting.description: Returns true if the audio exporter is currently rendering the audio on a background thread.

isLocked.description: Returns true if the given thread is currently locked.

isLockedByCurrentThread.description: Returns true if the given thread is currently locked by the current thread.

killVoicesAndCall.description: Kills all voices, suspends the audio processing and calls the given function on the loading thread. Returns true if the function was executed synchronously.

startProfiling.description: Starts a profiling session and calls the finishCallback when ready.

toString.description: Returns the name of the given string (for debugging purposes only!).
